description: Predictive maintenance AI for industrial CNC machines that forecasts bearing wear from vibration sensor data and alerts technicians before a breakdown.
notes: TRAP: the word 'predictive' should not trigger predictive-policing rules; this is industrial reliability ML with no impact on natural persons

description: Air traffic control AI that sequences arrival slots at a major international airport based on real-time aircraft position, weather, and runway capacity.
notes: Annex III critical infrastructure — safety component of air traffic management; also potentially Annex I via aviation regulation

description: Adaptive AI tutoring platform that monitors how university students answer questions, scores their learning outcomes per module, and routes them to remedial content automatically.
notes: Annex III education — evaluating learning outcomes; the routing-to-remedial-content is the high-risk hook

description: Consumer fitness coach mobile app that suggests workout plans based on the user's logged activity and self-reported goals.
notes: Consumer wellness; not a medical device, no clinical claims, no Annex III hook

description: AI system used by a transplant centre to rank kidney donor-recipient compatibility based on HLA typing, blood group, and waitlist data — output drives final allocation decisions.
notes: Annex III essential health services + life-and-death decisioning; also potentially Annex I medical-device adjacency

description: Dating app match recommender that suggests potential matches based on user profile, swipe history, and stated preferences.
notes: Pure consumer recommender system; not a chatbot in the Article 50 sense

description: A 7-billion-parameter multilingual neural machine translation model that we train and offer as a paid API to downstream localisation companies.
notes: GPAI provider: NNb-parameter foundation model offered as API to downstream deployers; no systemic-risk markers

description: Real-time pedestrian detection AI built into our production passenger cars; if a pedestrian is detected on the trajectory it triggers automated emergency braking.
notes: Annex I product-safety component of a regulated machine (automotive type-approval regulation); deadline is Phase 4 (2 Aug 2027) per Article 113

description: AI assistant that drafts personalised, jurisdiction-specific legal contracts (NDAs, supplier agreements, employment offers) from the user's prompt — output marked as 'AI-generated'.
notes: Article 50 transparency duty — AI-generated text/content must be labelled

description: Gig-marketplace AI that matches freelance professionals to client projects on our platform and assigns them based on past ratings and stated availability.
notes: Annex III employment — task allocation in work-related relationships extends to platform workers per Art 3 + Annex III(4)(b)
